description_long: This object is a modern stealth fighter jet, characterized by its angular, low-observable design and twin vertical stabilizers. The fuselage is sleek and streamlined, with sharply swept wings and a pointed nose cone, optimized for high-speed flight and radar evasion. The jet features two large engine exhausts at the rear, and its undercarriage includes visible hardpoints for mounting missiles or other ordnance. The cockpit canopy is tinted and smoothly integrated into the body, providing a clear forward view for the pilot. The surface is finished in a dark, matte color scheme with subtle panel lines and a few visible insignia and numbers on the tail. The overall appearance is aggressive and technologically advanced, suitable for air superiority missions.
description: A sleek, angular stealth fighter jet with twin vertical stabilizers, dark matte finish, and visible hardpoints for weaponry. The design is streamlined for speed and radar evasion.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, and sharply swept wings with twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, visible hardpoints under the wing, and tail markings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin engine exhausts, angular tail fins, and broad wingspan.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible hardpoints and tail markings.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Four visible hardpoints under the wings for mounting missiles or ordnance.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with smooth, angular panels; thickness not visually determinable but appears robust and integrated for stealth.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark gray and black paint scheme with no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: White alphanumeric codes and insignia on the vertical stabilizers.
